creator: nick@anywi.com
text:
umodem supports the Sony Ericsson W810i phone. Listing all devices is not a
good idea, but adding this one, might give people with another Sony Ericsson
phone perhaps an idea to try this driver for their phone.

After all umodem is not a very commonly used driver. Usually a serial
connection is a bulk pipe, no more.

How-To-Repeat: ...
addr 1: UHCI root hub, Intel, device uhub2
 addr 2: Sony Ericsson W810, Sony Ericsson, device ucom0
...
